data.name: bombo 808
data.code: arrange([4, s("bd ~ ~ ~ bd ~ ~ ~").bank("RolandTR808").shape(0.45)], [4, s("bd ~ ~ ~ bd ~ ~ ~").bank("RolandTR808").shape(0.45)], [4, s("bd ~ ~ ~ bd ~ ~ ~").bank("RolandTR808").shape(0.5)], [8, s("bd ~ ~ ~ bd ~ ~ ~").bank("RolandTR808").shape(0.5)], [8, s("bd ~ ~ bd bd ~ ~ ~").bank("RolandTR808").shape(0.5)])._scope()

data.name: 808 dist
data.code: arrange([4, silence], [4, note("c1 ~ ~ eb1 ~ ~ g0 ~").s("sawtooth").lpf(620).lpq(3).shape(0.5).coarse(2)], [4, note("c1 ~ ~ eb1 ~ ~ g0 ~").s("sawtooth").lpf(640).lpq(3).shape(0.55).coarse(2)], [8, note("c1 ~ ~ eb1 ~ ~ g0 ~").s("sawtooth").lpf(680).lpq(3).shape(0.6).coarse(2)], [8, note("c1 ~ eb1 ~ g0 ~ bb0 ~").s("sawtooth").lpf(680).lpq(3).shape(0.6).coarse(2)])._scope()

data.name: hats trap
data.code: arrange([4, silence], [4, silence], [4, s("hh*8 hh*16").bank("RolandTR808").gain(0.38)], [8, s("hh*8 hh*16").bank("RolandTR808").gain(0.4)], [8, s("hh*16").bank("RolandTR808").gain(saw.range(0.2,0.45))])

data.name: caja
data.code: arrange([4, silence], [4, silence], [4, s("~ ~ ~ ~ sd ~ ~ ~").bank("RolandTR808").gain(0.9).room(0.25)], [8, s("~ ~ ~ ~ sd ~ ~ ~").bank("RolandTR808").gain(0.9).room(0.25)], [8, s("~ ~ ~ ~ sd ~ ~ ~").bank("RolandTR808").gain(0.9).room(0.3)])

data.name: cowbell
data.code: arrange([4, silence], [4, silence], [4, silence], [8, note("c5 c5 eb5 c5 g4 c5 bb4 g4").s("cb").bank("RolandTR808").gain(0.55)], [8, note("c5 c5 eb5 c5 g4 c5 bb4 g4").s("cb").bank("RolandTR808").gain(0.58)])._pianoroll()

data.name: lead oscuro
data.code: arrange([4, silence], [4, silence], [4, silence], [8, silence], [8, note("c4 ~ eb4 ~ g4 ~ ~ ~").s("sawtooth").lpf(1200).lpq(5).room(0.4).gain(0.3)])._pianoroll()
